# Take-Home Interview Walkthrough

## When to Use
- Before follow-up interview.
- When preparing answers for code decisions and trade-offs.

## Procedure
1. Summarize problem understanding and requirement prioritization.
2. Explain architecture and implementation choices.
3. Describe alternatives considered and why they were not chosen.
4. Walk through one tricky part and how it was solved.
5. Explain testing approach and edge-case coverage.
6. Share limitations and what you would improve with more time.

## Output Format
- `Project narrative (2-3 minutes)`
- `Key decisions`
- `Trade-offs`
- `Testing story`
- `Next improvements`
